channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner officially withdraws from race
item.description: Graham Platner formally withdrew from the Maine Senate race on Friday.

item.title: Comedian Jeff Arcuri discusses his new Netflix special and crowd work
item.description: ABC News interviewed Jeff Arcuri about his Netflix special, TikTok rise, and crowd engagement skills.

item.title: Journalists reportedly receive subpoenas over Air Force One coverage
item.description: Subpoenas followed a New York Times report on security issues with the new Qatari-gifted Air Force One.

item.title: Ten injured in overnight Russian strikes on Kyiv
item.description: Ukraine's air defenses intercepted two missiles and 111 drones; Russia said it targeted drone production sites.
